chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI S.M.A. No. 18 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main petition. 09.02.2021 Ms. Lubna A. Abbasi, advocate for petitioner. ----------- Through the instant petition, petitioner Syed Fida-a-Asghar Zaiai has prayed for the grant of Letter of Administration in respect of immoveable property/asset, details whereof are mentioned in the Schedule of Property attached with the memo of petition, available at page 25, which was left by his deceased mother, namely, Mst. Syeda Sultan Fatima Naqvi, who allegedly died on 21st August, 2008 at Karachi, leaving behind her eight legal heirs, details whereof are mentioned in paragraph No. 2 of the memo of petition. Original Death Certificate of deceased as well as photostat copies of Family Registration Certificate, issued by the NADRA and title documents of the immovable property are also filed at page 17, 21 and 29 to 47. Legal heirs No. 2, 5, 6, 7 & 8 have filed their Affidavits of No- Objection for the grant of Letter of Administration in favour of the petitioner/legal heir No.1. Legal heirs No. 2 as well as legal heirs No. 3 & 4 have executed Special Power of Attorney duly authenticated by the Notary Public at Karachi, Multan and Sadiqabad in favour of the petitioner, who has filed such Affidavit of No-Objection on behalf legal heirs No. 3 & 4, which are available on record. 2 Two witnesses, namely, Syed Ali Imran Naqvi and Syed Saeedul Hassan have also filed their respective affidavits and affirmed that there is no other legal heir of the deceased except mentioned above. Their affidavits are also available on record.

Legal heirs No. 2 as well as legal heirs No. 3 & 4 have executed Special Power of Attorney duly authenticated by the Notary Public at Karachi, Multan and Sadiqabad in favour of the petitioner, who has filed such Affidavit of No-Objection on behalf legal heirs No. 3 & 4, which are available on record. 2 Two witnesses, namely, Syed Ali Imran Naqvi and Syed Saeedul Hassan have also filed their respective affidavits and affirmed that there is no other legal heir of the deceased except mentioned above. Their affidavits are also available on record. Notice of this petition was published in Daily “Jang” Karachi dated 12th January, 2021; however, none has filed any objection to the grant of Letter of Administration to petitioner, as per the report submitted by the Deputy Registrar (OS) on 28th January, 2021. Today petitioner and legal heirs No. 5 to 8 as well as above named witnesses are present. They affirm the contents of memo of petition as well as their affidavits and also verify their signatures made thereon. Since all the legal formalities/requirements have been fulfilled, there is no impediment in grant of Letter of Administration to petitioner, therefore, the petition is allowed. The office is directed to issue Letter of Administration in respect of immovable property/asset shown in the Schedule of Property, as per rules. J U D G E Athar Zai
